systemView.OverallMetricsTips: For the Ascend Hardware layer, events are further broken down into computation, communication, and idle events. Computation breaks down the time spent on key operators such as FA and MM, while communication breaks down transfer and wait times by communication domain. Collected events must include CPU (framework-side) and NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include both ProfilerActivity.CPU and ProfilerActivity.NPU. The collection level must be L1 or higher. To further obtain sub-level classification of computation time, the AI Core performance metric must be set to PipeUtilization.
systemView.OperatorDetailsTips: The statistics of the operator details table summarized by type, the collection items are the same as the operator details table
systemView.PythonAPISummaryTips: Statistics for Python layer events. Collected events must include CPU (framework-side) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.CPU.
systemView.PythonAPITraceTips: Lists individual Python layer APIs by start time. Collected events must include CPU (framework-side) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.CPU.
systemView.CANNAPISummaryTips: Statistics for CANN layer events. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU.
systemView.CANNAPITraceTips: Lists individual CANN layer APIs by start time. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU.
systemView.AscendHardWareTaskSummaryTips: Statistics for Ascend Hardware layer events. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU.
systemView.AscendHardWareTaskTraceTips: Lists individual Ascend Hardware layer operators by start time. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU.
systemView.CommunicationSummaryTips: Statistics for Communication layer events. The collection level must be L1 or higher.
systemView.CommunicationTraceTips: Lists individual Communication layer streams by start time. The collection level must be L1 or higher.
systemView.OverlapAnalysisTips: Categorized statistics of computation, communication, and idle events for the Ascend Hardware layer. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU. To obtain the Communication breakdown results, the collection level must be L1 or higher.
systemView.KernelDetailsTips: Detailed information for Ascend Hardware layer (i.e., NPU) operators. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU. To further obtain operator type, accelerator core, and input/output shapes, the collection level must be L1 or higher.
systemView.ExpertAnalysisTips: Analysis of NPU frequency throttling, which can affect NPU computation performance. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU.
systemView.AffinityAPITips: Analyzes APIs that could be replaced with affinity alternatives. Collected events must include CPU (framework-side) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.CPU.
systemView.AffinityOptimizerTips: Analyzes optimizers that could be replaced with affinity alternatives. Collected events must include CPU (framework-side) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.CPU.
systemView.AICPUOperatorsTips: AICPU operators may not fully utilize AI Core resources. Consider reducing AI CPU-type operators as suggested in the notes. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU. The collection level must be L1 or higher.
systemView.ACLNNOperatorsTips: Analyzes ACLNN operators that could be optimized. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU.
systemView.OperatorsFusionTips: Identifies operators that could be replaced with fused alternatives. See the Ascend Extension for PyTorch fused operator replacement documentation. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU. The collection level must be L1 or higher.
systemView.OperatorsDispatchTips: Identifies time-consuming aclOpCompile operations during operator dispatch. Consider disabling online compilation as suggested in the notes. Collected events must include NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data. For example, when using the PyTorch Profiler API, the activities config must include ProfilerActivity.NPU.
systemView.KernelE2ETimeTips: End-to-end kernel dispatch time statistics, showing per-stage durations, status, and diagnostic information for each operator dispatch pipeline. Click a table row to highlight the corresponding Timeline slices for that pipeline. Collected events must include CPU (framework-side) and NPU (CANN software stack and NPU hardware layer) data.

tableHead.Name: Name
tableHead.PathTooltip: Kernel dispatch path type: ACLOP or ACLNN
tableHead.PrepareTimeTooltip: PythonCall parent: earliest Enqueue Start - Python API Start among all leaf descendants; CANN API parent/Full-chain leaf: Enqueue Start - Python API Start; Launch leaf: empty
tableHead.PythonApiTimeTooltip: PythonCall parent/CANN API parent/Full-chain leaf: Python API End - Python API Start; Launch leaf: empty
tableHead.EnqueueTimeTooltip: PythonCall parent: sum of all leaf descendants Enqueue Time; CANN API parent/Full-chain leaf: Enqueue End - Enqueue Start; Launch leaf: empty
tableHead.QueueTimeTooltip: PythonCall parent: sum of all leaf descendants Queue Time; CANN API parent/Full-chain leaf: Dequeue Start - Enqueue End; Launch leaf: empty
tableHead.Pipeline2TimeTooltip: PythonCall parent: sum of all leaf descendants Pipeline2 Time; CANN API parent: sum of child leaf Pipeline2 Time; Full-chain leaf/Launch leaf: Launch End - Dequeue Start (falls back to Dequeue End when Launch End is unavailable)
tableHead.LaunchTimeTooltip: PythonCall parent: sum of all leaf descendants Launch Time; CANN API parent: sum of child leaf Launch Time; Full-chain leaf/Launch leaf: Launch End - Launch Start (empty when no Launch)
tableHead.E2ETimeTooltip: PythonCall parent: max E2E Time among all leaf descendants; CANN API parent: max E2E Time among child leaf descendants; Full-chain leaf/Launch leaf: Launch End - Python API Start (falls back to Dequeue End when Launch End is unavailable)

floatingToolbar.autoFitHeightDescription: Adapt lane height automatically as the visible area changes.
floatingToolbar.selectionModeDescription: Select operators precisely, highlight them, and focus on their position.
